raw_text:
<think>
The user wants us to output a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave us the values:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-8E88066E
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

We need to produce exactly three lines, each key=value. No extra lines, no headings, no explanations, no JSON, no markdown.

Thus:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-8E88066E
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

Make sure not to add any spaces before or after equals sign? The user gave key=value format. Should we include exactly the given strings.

Thus answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-8E88066E
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
